# Add a Green Tip

## Summary
Describe the tip you added to `greentips/tips.json` in 1 to 3 sentences.

## Tip Details
- Title:
- Category:
- Languages Supported:
- Impact:

## Checklist
- [ ] I added the new tip to `greentips/tips.json`.
- [ ] I followed the existing JSON structure and formatting.
- [ ] I used a unique `id`.
- [ ] I included at least one supporting source in `source`.
- [ ] I included matching links in `sourceLink`.
- [ ] I filled in the `future_static_analysis` section in a way that matches the existing format.
- [ ] I checked that the JSON is still valid.

## Optional Context
Add any extra explanation that may help with review, such as why this tip is useful, where it applies, or anything reviewers should verify.
